<svg width="400" height="200" viewBox="0 0 400 200" fill="black">
    <!-- Bicycle Frame -->
    <path d="M50,150 L100,180 L300,100 L350,180 L350,180 L300,100 L250,170" stroke="white" stroke-width="5" fill="none"/>
    
    <!-- Wheels -->
    <circle cx="100" cy="180" r="20" fill="black" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="300" cy="100" r="20" fill="black" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/>
    
    <!-- Spokes -->
    <line x1="100" y1="180" x2="115" y2="180" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="100" y1="180" x2="85" y2="180" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="300" y1="100" x2="315" y2="100" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="300" y1="100" x2="285" y2="100" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    
    <!-- Seat -->
    <rect x="170" y="50" width="60" height="20" rx="10" ry="10" fill="yellow"/>
    
    <!-- Saddle -->
    <rect x="175" y="55" width="50" height="10" fill="black"/>
    
    <!-- Chain -->
    <line x1="170" y1="100" x2="350" y2="180" stroke="white" stroke-width="3"/>
</svg>

<svg width="400" height="400" viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <title>Beer Mug with Beer and Coins</title>
  <desc>A SVG illustration of a beer mug with beer and coins inside</desc>
  
  <!-- Beer Mug Body -->
  <path fill="#8B4513" d="M100 80 
                            Q 140 80 160 100 
                            Q 165 115 160 130 
                            Q 150 150 125 155 
                            Q 100 160 75 155 
                            Q 60 145 55 120 
                            Q 55 90 80 85 
                            Z"/>
  
  <!-- Handle -->
  <rect x="70" y="85" width="60" height="30" rx="15" fill="#8B4513"/>
  
  <!-- Beer Inside -->
  <rect x="85" y="95" width="30" height="40" fill="#469B58" opacity="0.8"/>
  
  <!-- Coins -->
  <circle cx="120" cy="115" r="7" fill="url(#coinGradient)"/>
  <circle cx="110" cy="105" r="6" fill="url(#coinGradient)"/>
  <circle cx="95" cy="125" r="8" fill="url(#coinGradient)"/>
  
  <!-- Coin Gradient -->
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="coinGradient" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffd700;stop-opacity:1"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#daa520;stop-opacity:1"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Highlights -->
  <circle cx="125" cy="100" r="3" fill="url(#highlightGradient)" opacity="0.5"/>
  <circle cx="130" cy="95" r="3" fill="url(#highlightGradient)" opacity="0.5"/>
  
  <!-- Highlight Gradient -->
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="highlightGradient" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:0"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Accessibility Text -->
  <text x="-100" y="-100" fill="transparent">Beer Mug with Beer Coins SVG</text>
</svg>

<svg width="300px" height="300px" viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <g>
    <!-- Company Logo Shape -->
    <rect x="20" y="20" width="260" height="260" rx="30" fill="url(#logoGradient)">
    </rect>
    
    <!-- Gradient Definition -->
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="logoGradient">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#1a365d;stop-opacity:1" />
        <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#00ffd8;stop-opacity:1" />
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#8c43ff;stop-opacity:1" />
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>

    <!-- Center Circle -->
    <circle cx="150" cy="120" r="30" fill="#ffffff" />
    
    <!-- Text -->
    <text x="50%" y="70%" dominant-baseline="middle" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="bold" fill="url(#textGradient)">
      ExampleCorp
    </text>
    
    <!-- Text Gradient -->
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="textGradient">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#1a365d;stop-opacity:1" />
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#8c43ff;stop-opacity:1" />
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg width="400" height="400" viewBox="0 0 400 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <title>Bicycle</title>
  <desc>A simple vector illustration of a bicycle with a yellow seat on a black background</desc>
  <rect width="400" height="400" fill="#000"/>
  <!-- Bike Frame -->
  <path d="M180 100 L220 100 L265 140 L240 180 L240 280 L220 320 L180 320 L160 280 L160 240 L140 200 L180 100" fill="#333" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Handlebar -->
  <path d="M180 100 C180 80 200 50 220 70" stroke="#666" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Seat -->
  <path d="M240 200 L260 200 L265 180 L260 160 L240 160 L235 180 L240 200" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#666" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Wheel (Left) -->
  <path d="M100 260 C140 260 140 300 100 300 C60 300 60 260 100 260 Z" fill="#333"/>
  <!-- Pedal -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="260" r="8" fill="#666" />
  <circle cx="120" cy="260" r="8" fill="#666" />
  <line x1="100" y1="260" x2="120" y2="260" stroke="#666" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Chain -->
  <path d="M140 200 C160 220 160 260 180 280" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Chainring -->
  <path d="M180 250 C180 270 160 270 160 250 L160 250 L180 250" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Seat Stay -->
  <path d="M240 180 L265 40" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Front Fork -->
  <path d="M220 70 L60 140" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4"/>
  <!-- Brake -->
  <path d="M60 140 L80 140" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>
